arts.ttl: AZ vs Tottenham Hotspur team news LIVE!
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar forward Troy Parrott has no regrets about his time at Tottenham, but would be more than happy to score against his former club on Thursday. When I look back, I just think about the good times I had growing up there.

arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar v Tottenham LIVE: Europa League team news and line-ups as Spurs face crunch last-16 tie
arts.sum: The Europa League is Spurs, and embattled boss Ange Postecoglou’s, last chance for a trophy this season

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur's £18m transfer reality a huge boost for Ange Postecoglou's summer plans
arts.sum: Central defender Luka Vuskovic agreed a deal to sign for Spurs back in September 2023, joining the club from the summer of 2025. The Europa League remains the only chance of silverware this season for Postecoglou to win, continuing his trend of winning silverware in his second year at clubs he's managed.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson names four Europa League favourites as 'dangerous' Tottenham verdict given
arts.sum: Paul Merson believes that Tottenham are one of the four favourites to win the Europa League, as Ange Postecoglou's side prepare to take on AZ Alkmaar in the round of 16 first leg. Speaking ahead of Spurs' trip to Alkmaar, Merson told Sky Sports : "If you look at the Europa League, Tottenham, Lyon, Athletic Bilbao and Lazio are the four teams to win it.

arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar vs Spurs TV channel and Europa League live stream
arts.sum: With TNT sports broadcasting AZ Alkmaar vs Tottenham, that means the game will also be available to live stream on Thursday evening. Yes, TNT Sports have the broadcasting rights for the Europa League in the UK and will be covering the game on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero start one of five Tottenham changes Ange Postecoglou to consider vs AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Postecoglou is likely to tinker with his side from last Wednesday's defeat at home to Manchester City and there is the possibility that some of his returning players feature in Alkmaar. Tottenham will be looking to start the Europa League knockout phase in style when they face AZ Alkmaar on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar's Parrott has 'no regrets' about Spurs stint
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar forward Troy Parrott says he has no regrets about his time with former club Tottenham as he prepares to face them in the Europa League last 16.

arts.ttl: Ange and the Boss: the Australian title and ties that bind Postecoglou and Puskás
arts.sum: There is emotional and cultural heft to the story revealed in a film about the Hungarian football great’s time as coach of South Melbourne Hellas Based on a blur of childhood memory that hardly equals sociology, Australia in the 1980s and 90s was a place obsessed with celebrity. A small population at the far end of the world, a gap unbridged by cheap flights and eternal internet: when famous people came to visit, it was a huge deal. When Australians got involved in major events overseas, even bigger. There were years when Nicole Kidman just showing up at the Oscars felt like a national event. So it’s a hell of a story that one of the world’s greatest footballers coached a local soccer team in 1991, and hardly anybody noticed. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Probable Spurs line-up: Van de Ven and Solanke as substitutes against AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: AZ await the visit of Tottenham Hotspur tonight in the first of two Europa League round of 16 fixtures. As per VI, here's how Spurs may line up.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Tottenham make contact for player – Leeds United scouts impressed
arts.sum: Aston Villa, Tottenham and Leeds United have all shown an interest in Viktoria Pilsen midfielder Pavel Šulc but are yet to make any offers for him. That’s according to Efotbal.cz, who over the 24-year-old today and the potential interest in him from England.
